---
title: "CSAS 2026 Intro to R Notes"
author: "Tyler Adams"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

Copy and paste code into the console, or click the 
run button located in the corner of your code block 
if you have the notes loaded in your IDE.

## R Syntax Example Code
```{r}
# Example 1
print("Hello world")
```

```{r}
# Example 2
x <- 2
y = 3
```

```{r}
# Example 3

# Addition
print(2 + 2)

# Subtraction
print(4 - 2)

# Multiplication (variables can be used too)
print(y * x)

# Division
print(x / 3)

# Exponentiation
print(x^2)
# or
print(x**2)
```
